title: Shri Shani dev ji  Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Shani Dev Ji Ki Aarti and seek the divine blessings of Shri Shani Dev Ji.
description:
Jai Jai Shri Shanidev,
Bhaktan hitkari.
Suraj ke putra prabhu,
Chhaya mahtari॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Shanidev ॥

Shyam ank vakra drisht,
Chaturbhuja dhari.
Neelambar dhar nath,
Gaj ki avsari॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Shanidev ॥

Kreet mukut sheesh rajit,
Dipat hai lilari.
Muktan ki mala gale,
Shobhit balihari॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Shanidev ॥

Modak mishthan paan,
Chadhat hai supari.
Loha til tel udad,
Mahishi ati pyari॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Shanidev ॥

De danuj rishi muni,
Sumirat nar nari.
Vishwanath dharat dhyan,
Sharan hain tumhari॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Shanidev ॥

Aarti Shanidev ki,
Jo koi nar gaave.
Kahat Shivanand Swami,
Manvanchit phal paave॥
॥ Jai Jai Shri Shanidev ॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Shani Dev's Aarti?
faq.a1: He is the God of Justice; his Aarti helps reduce the effects of 'Sade Sati' and removes obstacles from life.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for Shani Dev's Puja and Aarti?
faq.a2: Saturday is considered the most auspicious day for worshipping Shani Dev.
faq.q3: What offerings are preferred for Shani Dev during Aarti?
faq.a3: Shani Dev prefers mustard oil, black sesame seeds, black gram (Urad dal), and black cloth.
faq.q4: Can Shani Dev's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, but it is considered better to pray to his feet rather than looking directly into his eyes.
faq.q5: What should be done after the Aarti for peace of mind?
faq.a5: Reciting the 'Shani Chalisa' after the Aarti is considered highly beneficial.
